title: Dry Swab Sampling and Transportation
author: Chunan Liu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kaecsbe

steps.title: Designate a location to be swabbed,...
steps.instruction: Designate a location to be swabbed, taking care to note the size of the area. Remove the swab from the tube, swab the entire area in a zigzag pattern, rolling the swab over to ensure the entire swab is used.

steps.title: Carefully insert the swab into the...
steps.instruction: Carefully insert the swab into the tube, making sure to seat the cap firmly on the tube. Label the sample with a unique identifier, such as the patient_ID, location the sample was taken, the date.

steps.title: Place samples and all paperwork in...
steps.instruction: Place samples and all paperwork in Styrofoam container and arrange shipment for next day delivery. Do not ship over the weekend.
